judge_result.notes: The artefact demonstrates the expected design token system output: structured markdown with Australian English ('colour'), a machine-readable W3C JSON token definition covering colour, typography, spacing, radius, shadow, and motion (duration), plus a CSS Variables export. Canonical sections (overview, naming convention, token set, export formats) are present. The example is truncated but the visible content satisfies all three criteria.
